disclaimer_zh: 本区块汇聚实时动态，经 AI 翻译为中文摘要。AI 翻译可能存在偏差，关键判断请以蓝色「官方通报」为准。

updates.title_en: Saudi Arabia issues summer travel health warning over Ebola, Hantavirus, Yellow Fever and flu - Arabian Business
updates.body_en: Saudi Arabia issues summer travel health warning over Ebola, Hantavirus, Yellow Fever and flu Arabian Business
updates.summary_zh: 沙特发布夏季旅行健康警告，涉及埃博拉、汉坦病毒等。

updates.title_en: HHS Suspends Hantavirus Monitoring | RT - respiratory-therapy.com
updates.body_en: HHS Suspends Hantavirus Monitoring | RT respiratory-therapy.com
updates.summary_zh: 美国卫生与公众服务部暂停汉坦病毒监测。

updates.title_en: Hantavirus outbreak over: WHO - CTV News
updates.body_en: Hantavirus outbreak over: WHO CTV News
updates.summary_zh: WHO 宣布汉坦病毒疫情结束。

updates.title_en: WHO declare hantavirus outbreak is over months after first case was recorded - The Independent
updates.body_en: WHO declare hantavirus outbreak is over months after first case was recorded The Independent
updates.summary_zh: WHO 宣布汉坦病毒疫情结束，距首例数月。

updates.title_en: Hantavirus outbreak on MV Hondius cruise ship officially over: WHO - Global News
updates.body_en: Hantavirus outbreak on MV Hondius cruise ship officially over: WHO Global News
updates.summary_zh: WHO 宣布 MV Hondius 邮轮汉坦病毒疫情正式结束。

updates.title_en: WHO issues final update on deadly cruise ship hantavirus outbreak - The Independent
updates.body_en: WHO issues final update on deadly cruise ship hantavirus outbreak The Independent
updates.summary_zh: WHO 发布致命邮轮汉坦病毒疫情最终更新。

updates.title_en: Hantavirus Cruise Ship Outbreak Over, WHO Says - Forbes
updates.body_en: Hantavirus Cruise Ship Outbreak Over, WHO Says Forbes
updates.summary_zh: WHO 称邮轮汉坦病毒疫情已结束。

updates.title_en: WHO declares hantavirus outbreak linked to cruise ship over - The Guardian
updates.body_en: WHO declares hantavirus outbreak linked to cruise ship over The Guardian
updates.summary_zh: WHO 宣布与邮轮相关的汉坦病毒疫情结束。

updates.title_en: WHO says Hantavirus outbreak linked to ship is over - BBC
updates.body_en: WHO says Hantavirus outbreak linked to ship is over BBC
updates.summary_zh: WHO 表示与邮轮相关的汉坦病毒疫情结束。

updates.title_en: Hantavirus outbreak linked to cruise ship over after last contact completes quarantine: WHO - ABC News - Breaking News, Latest News and Videos
updates.body_en: Hantavirus outbreak linked to cruise ship over after last contact completes quarantine: WHO ABC News - Breaking News, Latest News and Videos
updates.summary_zh: WHO 宣布邮轮汉坦病毒疫情结束，最后接触者完成隔离。

updates.title_en: Deadly Hantavirus Cruise Ship Outbreak Is Over 3 Months Later, W.H.O. Says - The New York Times
updates.body_en: Deadly Hantavirus Cruise Ship Outbreak Is Over 3 Months Later, W.H.O. Says The New York Times
updates.summary_zh: WHO 称致命邮轮汉坦病毒疫情三个月后结束。

updates.title_en: WHO declares cruise-linked hantavirus outbreak officially over - Al Jazeera
updates.body_en: WHO declares cruise-linked hantavirus outbreak officially over Al Jazeera
updates.summary_zh: WHO 宣布邮轮相关汉坦病毒疫情正式结束。

updates.title_en: Self-isolation ends for travellers exposed to hantavirus-stricken cruise ship - Times Colonist
updates.body_en: Self-isolation ends for travellers exposed to hantavirus-stricken cruise ship Times Colonist
updates.summary_zh: 暴露于汉坦病毒邮轮的旅行者结束自我隔离。

updates.title_en: Canadians exposed to hantavirus on cruise ship complete isolation period - CBC
updates.body_en: Canadians exposed to hantavirus on cruise ship complete isolation period CBC
updates.summary_zh: 暴露于邮轮汉坦病毒的加拿大人完成隔离期。

updates.title_en: CDC NNDSS — Hantavirus infection (US, 2026 week 26): 0 new, 1 YTD
updates.body_en: Weekly aggregate from CDC NNDSS table for "Hantavirus infection, non-hantavirus pulmonary syndrome". Current week: 0. YTD 2026: 1.
updates.summary_zh: 美国 CDC 周报：2026 年第 26 周汉坦病毒新增 0 例，全年累计 1 例。

updates.title_en: Yukon hantavirus cruise ship passenger discharged from B.C. hospital, still recovering - Yukon News
updates.body_en: Yukon hantavirus cruise ship passenger discharged from B.C. hospital, still recovering Yukon News
updates.summary_zh: 育空汉坦病毒邮轮乘客从卑诗省医院出院，仍在康复。

updates.title_en: Hantavirus infection: Neurologic manifestations should not be overlooked - Springer Nature Link
updates.body_en: Hantavirus infection: Neurologic manifestations should not be overlooked Springer Nature Link
updates.summary_zh: 研究指出汉坦病毒神经系统表现不应被忽视。

updates.title_en: HHS Successfully Concludes Hantavirus Response Effort; Monitoring Ends with No Positive U.S. Case - HHS.gov
updates.body_en: HHS Successfully Concludes Hantavirus Response Effort; Monitoring Ends with No Positive U.S. Case HHS.gov
updates.summary_zh: 美国 HHS 结束汉坦病毒响应，监测无阳性病例。

updates.title_en: CDC Officially Ends Hantavirus Response as Outbreak Risk Recedes - Journal of Managed Care
updates.body_en: CDC Officially Ends Hantavirus Response as Outbreak Risk Recedes Journal of Managed Care
updates.summary_zh: 美国 CDC 正式结束汉坦病毒响应，疫情风险消退。

updates.title_en: International public health response helped contain Andes hantavirus outbreak on Dutch cruise ship - CIDRAP
updates.body_en: International public health response helped contain Andes hantavirus outbreak on Dutch cruise ship CIDRAP
updates.summary_zh: 国际公共卫生响应帮助控制荷兰邮轮上的安第斯汉坦病毒疫情。

updates.title_en: CDC ends US Hantavirus response - The Hill
updates.body_en: CDC ends US Hantavirus response The Hill
updates.summary_zh: 美国CDC结束汉坦病毒应急响应。
